description: The bird was already sitting 1/2 out of the cattails when I arrived. The bird was about the size of an American Coot. The bird looked blackish with a red shield/bill. The bill portion was thicker like a coot and had a orangish yellow tip. The undertail portion at the back was pure white. There was a thin white line along the sides/flanks. It was initially preening and then slowly walked across the open water area while several times picking something from the matted weed edge. It then walked into the cattails on the other side of the open water.
